stages.prompt: Write: "One time I failed but tried again was ___."
stages.guidance: Think about a time you failed but didn't give up.

stages.prompt: Describe a time you fell down but got back up. What happened?
stages.guidance: Think about a setback you overcame.

stages.prompt: Write about a mistake you made and how you fixed it.
stages.guidance: How did you learn from your mistake?

stages.prompt: Describe a challenge you faced and how you bounced back.
stages.guidance: What helped you recover and try again?

stages.prompt: Write about a time you didn't give up even when it was hard.
